subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou through Whose remembrance the names are drawn forth, and through Whose Name earth and heaven are subdued! I beseech Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من بذکرک انجذبت الاسماء و باسمک سخرت الارض و السماء اسئلک
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
